relations.note: Styles represent the structured patterns categorized under callout rules.
Text-heavy callouts must enforce responsive layout collapse rules on mobile.

quotes: use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section
never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Maintain visual hierarchy and avoid user fatigue by limiting competing callout containers.
rules.rule_text: Never place two callouts of the same style competing on one screen or section.

quotes: Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below

Main callout (key point): Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]

rules.intent: Standardize the key point callout treatment for clean editorial styling.
rules.rule_text: The main callout style uses centered Bold Brand Blue text (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) with Gold rules (callout.main.rule_color = #ffc60a) above and below, a 2px rule weight, 60-100% rule width, and 16px padding between rule and text.

quotes: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with Bold Brand Blue text

Secondary/data callout: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with Bold Brand Blue text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

rules.intent: Provide a structured, soft-colored container for data callouts.
rules.rule_text: The secondary callout uses a Light Blue box (color.tertiary.light_blue = #E6F0F9) at 70% tint (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) with Bold Brand Blue text, featuring 20px internal padding and corner radius per accent shape rules.

quotes: Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint, Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, Regular Graphite (#212121) body text

Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions): Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint, Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, Regular Graphite (#212121) body text. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

rules.intent: Stylize dense content and lists inside an attention-grabbing box designed for high readability.
rules.rule_text: The text-heavy callout uses a Golden Sand box (color.tertiary.golden_sand = #FEF1C8) at 30% tint (opacity.callout.golden_sand_box = 0.3), a Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue subheads (color.secondary.sky_blue = #358CCB), and Regular Graphite body (color.tertiary.graphite = #212121), utilizing 24px internal padding.

quotes: two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile

rules.intent: Maintain readability and structured flow on small screens.
rules.rule_text: The two-column icon and text layout in the text-heavy callout must collapse to a single column on mobile screens.
